summary: Practical guide to navigating AI agent sessions — low-entropy context, DOT graphs, staying on path, recovering from bad states
Write post on the cargo-first framing for space logistics — humans are operators, not cargo; mass budget drives everything; the clipper parallel deepened
Write post on the financial and institutional infrastructure required for space commerce — marine insurance as analogy, Lloyd's of London as model, what orbital commerce requires
Write post on the structural parallel between clipper-era maritime trade and current space logistics — the transport layer that unlocks the economy waiting behind it
Scan blog-posts silo for barnacles — registry drift, tradingagents carry-over, stale drafts, front-matter issues

Silo state assessment: P0 local Jekyll preview broken, no blog index, 5 drafts missing title. P1 flox activation untested, template post in _posts/, export never run. P2 first post, homepage design, lexicon decision.
SpaceX IPO biological deficit series — 6 posts published: zero-g explainer, perky pat layout, borg crucible/janeway, RGEM cathedral, seiza spatial play, bio-tensegrity
Post brief template with content outline, research checklist, and export checklist

Formalise self-verifying protocol in post-blog playbook — name, format, verification loop, channel assessment, two use cases (me-and-Jimmy + blog-as-reusable-asset). Playbook complete, exemplar published.

Propose tightening the entropy essay lineage prose into a closed-loop circuit (message, channel, signal, receiver, tripwire checksum); locate entropy-injection and selection-pressure points. Approach B: tighten, not append.
